race.comment: THEBUDGIESMUGLA (7) saves his best for this course and distance and looks up to level. Held off all challengers two-back when getting the job done over this trip at Randwick. Backed-up quickly when dropped in trip with a fading sixth over 2000m in the LR Lord Mayor's Cup at this track on a heavy (9) surface. Can take control early and prove too strong on the limit. SO YOU ARE (5) country-trained gelding who comes back in grade after fading to run fourth to Alalcance over 2400m in the G3 Premier's Cup at Eagle Farm. Stalks the speed and gets his chance. BLACK RUN (6) undefeated in two starts at this trip and a win looks imminent. Knocked up late in the heavy going after leading early when seventh over 2000m here. Desperate for a firmer surface. CABOCHE (4) slashing run from back in the field when saving ground along the inside to run fifth over 2000m at this track in the LR Lord Mayor's Cup. Can race closer and don't dismiss. MAISON LOUIS (2) proven at the trip and gets a firmer deck.
